metadata.description: Private marketplace for the Brain Engineering OS plugin. Distributes the AI engineering team that builds the Brain commerce OS.

plugins.name: brain-engineering-os
plugins.description: An AI engineering team delivered as a Claude Code plugin. Orchestrates CTO Advisor, Architect, Backend/Frontend/Mobile devs, Security, QA, and DevOps agents through an 8-stage requirement-to-release pipeline grounded in the Brain canon.
